positive.literal: solo, portrait, face focus, single character, head and shoulders

negative.literal: multiple views, multiple heads, extra heads, extra limbs, full body, hands, character sheet, reference sheet, cropped face, disembodied

laneRules: portrait is ONE face, head-and-shoulders framing — never a multi-view sheet or extra limbs.
The portrait is the identity ANCHOR: the fullbody sprite references it (identityRef) so the face stays the same character across appearances.
Slots are plain words only; structure lives in this template.

ERA LAW (all entity lanes) — a clothing/gear slot MUST carry an era qualifier (e.g. 'medieval fantasy clothing'); without it the model defaults to modern dress (a 'wool robe' rendered as a bathrobe). mapNpcToSlots injects the world's era descriptor (world.era) into the attire slot when the world data carries one; a world with no era field is a WORLD-DATA GAP (reported, never invented here).
